sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18469" key="a)fo/ruktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφόρυκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unspotted, unstained,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.323</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
